title: Siege of Deko Neimoidia
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Battle |prev=[[Siege of Cato Neimoidia|Battle of Cato Neimoidia]] |conc=*[[Battle of Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Second battle of Cato Neimoidia]] *[[Siege of Koru Neimoidia|Battle of Koru Neimoidia]] |next=[[Mission to Felucia]] |image= |name=Siege of Deko Neimoidia |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] |date=[[19 BBY/Legends|19.1 BBY]] (2 [[Standard year/Legends|years]], 11 [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]) |place=[[Deko Neimoidia/Legends|Deko Neimoidia]] |result=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] victory |side1=Galactic Republic |side2=*[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] *[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[High Jedi General/Legends|High General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] *[[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Roan Shryne]] *[[General/Legends|General]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] *[[Clone Marshal Commander/Legends|Marshal Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|CC-2224]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1=*[[22nd Air Combat Wing]] *[[Ion Team]] |unit2=[[Neimoidian Home Defense Legion/Legends|Neimoidian Home Defense Legion]] |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone troopers]] *[[Clone commando/Legends|Clone commandos]] |forces2=*[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]] *[[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] soldiers *Neimoidian tanks |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|The voice is familiar…''"
"''The face even more so. Climber. We fought together on Deko Neimoidia.''"
"''Good to see you again, Climber—even here.|[[Climber (clone)|Climber]] and Roan Shryne|''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''}} The '''siege of Deko Neimoidia''' was fought during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], prior to the fall of [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]] and around the time of the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]. ==The battle== Towards the end of the war, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forced the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] out of its purse worlds in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], sending the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]] fleeing to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. [[Deko Neimoidia/Legends|Deko Neimoidia]], one such [[Purse world/Legends|purse world]], was invaded by the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[22nd Air Combat Wing]], led by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Roan Shryne]]. [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|Cody]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] were part of the assault on the Trade Federation's citadel, and they were able to use the floorplans of the fortress to the Republic's advantage in their later [[Siege of Cato Neimoidia|attempt to capture]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]]. The [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Ion Team]] also participated in the battle, and General Shryne earned the respect of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Climber (clone)|Climber]], the team leader who later saved Shryne's life. Deko Neimoidia fell along with Cato and [[Koru Neimoidia/Legends|Koru Neimoidia]], eventually leading the leaders of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] to set up headquarters on the Outer Rim worlds of [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]] and [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' {{Ab|Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *{{CSWECite|I||Deko Neimoidia}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 33|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 33]] {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Deko Neimoidia }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Deko Neimoidia, siege of}} [[Category:Battles in the Colonies]] [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]]
